case_title: CASTRELLON FRANCISCO VS AFEX ASSOCIATED FOREIGN EXCHANGE INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $722.00 FILED BY CASTRELLON FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT AFEX ASSOCIATED FOREIGN EXCHANGE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
INVALID SERVICE AS TO AFEX, NO MAILING DONE ON SUBSERVICE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTRELLON FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AFEX ASSOCIATED FOREIGN EXCHANGE INC. $175.42 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $183.42 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT AFEX ASSOCIATED FOREIGN EXCHANGE INC.
